tasks.title: Category Point-of-View doc (Lochhead)
tasks.description: Write 2-page docs/strategy/category-pov.md: world today (red-CI agent loops, polyglot tool sprawl, governance gap), world we are describing (in-loop coverage governance, MCP-callable, polyglot-uniform), why now (3 bullets), category name, who benefits most (pruned ECP). Drives README hero, content calendar, conference pitches.

tasks.title: Monetization decision doc
tasks.description: Write 2-page docs/strategy/monetization-decision.md evaluating: open-core (hosted history/team dashboards/cloud MCP relay), paid SLA support, enterprise security gate (audit log, SSO, compliance export), pure OSS+sponsorship. Decide before scaling community GTM. Decision artifact only.

tasks.title: Reframe PRD overview + Initiative Hypothesis
tasks.description: Rewrite docs/design/language-agnostic-prd.md page 1: collapse Vision/Goals/Success Metrics into single Initiative Hypothesis (we believe X → outcome Y → for Z → known true when ... → riskiest assumption ...). Replace vanity metrics (5+ langs shipped, 1000 installs, GH stars) with NSM (Weekly Protected Agent Loops) + 4 input metrics (TTFP, MCP tool-call success, pre-commit hook adoption, regressions caught/session). Prune 4 personas to Taylor primary user + Jordan secondary buyer; demote Alex/Sam to compat-and-breadth notes.

tasks.title: Reframe ICP brief alternatives + motion stack
tasks.description: Rewrite docs/gtm/icp-brief.md: replace competitive alternatives section with red-CI agent loop as primary status quo (not Codecov). Split ECP (first 20 lighthouses, no compliance gate, last-90-day AI tool adoption trigger, visible CI pain signal) from ICP (compliance becomes accelerator, not gate). Cut motion stack to 2: community-led primary + content-led secondary; defer enterprise. Update positioning statement to claim agent-loop coverage category, not coverage-tools category.

tasks.title: MCP eval harness skeleton + seed scenarios
tasks.description: Build internal/eval/: harness.go (scripted headless MCP agent replay), report.go (tool-selection accuracy/recall/catch-rate metrics), 10 synthetic regression scenarios per top-5 languages (Go/Python/TS/Java/Rust) under internal/eval/scenarios/. Each scenario: seeded edit + known coverage drop + expected agent action. Establishes denominator for NSM regression catch rate.

tasks.title: LLM-as-judge + adversarial prompt set
tasks.description: Add internal/eval/judge.go: LLM-as-judge over agent-reply vs canonical coverctl output for output-interpretation accuracy. Add 50+ adversarial prompt-injection scenarios covering shell-metacharacter, dangerous-flag, path-traversal, output-channel injection. Validates sanitize.go denylist holds and output canonicalization works.

tasks.title: Wire eval harness into CI gate
tasks.description: Add .github/workflows/eval.yml running internal/eval/ on PR. Gate merges on tool-selection recall and adversarial pass rate thresholds. Reuse SARIF/JSON artifact uplift pattern from CI metrics dogfooding.

tasks.title: Mode-aware MCP serve flag + tool routing
tasks.description: Add coverctl mcp serve --mode=agent|ci. Agent mode advertises 3 tools (check, suggest, debt). CI mode advertises full 8. Implement in internal/mcp/server.go with mode-aware tool registration. Update README + docs/src/content/docs/mcp.mdx with mode flag.

tasks.title: Auto-detect MCP client for default mode
tasks.description: In internal/mcp/server.go inspect MCP initialize-handshake clientInfo to default --mode (Claude Code/Cursor/Cline → agent; gh-actions/CI → ci). Explicit flag wins. Document detection list.

tasks.title: Output boundary canonicalization
tasks.description: In internal/mcp/server.go canonicalize/escape user-controlled strings in tool outputs: file paths (allow [a-zA-Z0-9._/-]), test names, profile-derived strings, PR descriptions in pr-comment. Truncate long strings; fence in code blocks where rendered. Closes Lethal Trifecta output-channel injection.

tasks.title: Adversarial output-injection test suite
tasks.description: Add 50+ tests under internal/mcp/ covering output-side prompt injection: malicious test names, weaponized filenames in coverage profiles, attacker-supplied PR descriptions. Wire into internal/eval/ adversarial set from T6.

tasks.title: Threat-model doc output-boundary update
tasks.description: Extend docs/security/mcp-threat-model.md with output-boundary controls section: Lethal Trifecta framing, canonicalization rules, escape policy, residual risks. Add output-boundary tests to code references.

tasks.title: Structured rejection schema + remediation field
tasks.description: Define stable JSON schema for all MCP rejection responses: passed=false, error_code, summary, remediation (agent-actionable next step). Refactor internal/mcp/sanitize.go consumers in server.go to emit conformant rejections. Add schema doc to docs/src/content/docs/mcp.mdx.

tasks.title: Per-tool output budgets + verbosity + pagination
tasks.description: Add output token budget per tool (default 2K), brief|normal|verbose verbosity flag, nextCursor pagination on overflow. Auto-truncate verbose outputs (e.g., report) to top-N failing domains with summary. Implement in internal/mcp/ tool handlers.

tasks.title: CLI check output redesign + next-action footer
tasks.description: Redesign internal/cli/check.go print path: realistic mixed PASS/FAIL rows with shortfall delta column, summary count line, inline next-action footer (→ coverctl suggest DOMAIN / coverctl debt). Subtle Peak-End success line on first all-PASS run with next-step nudge (→ coverctl record).

tasks.title: Update quick-start sample output to mirror CLI
tasks.description: Replace optimistic all-PASS sample in docs/src/content/docs/quick-start.mdx with realistic mixed PASS/FAIL output matching new CLI design. Avoids first-run-surprise abandonment.

tasks.title: Failure-mode caution blocks per step
tasks.description: Add :::caution[If this fails] blocks to docs/src/content/docs/quick-start.mdx for init/check/suggest/record covering: no language markers, missing toolchain (pytest-cov/nyc/cargo-tarpaulin), profile path mismatch, threshold-too-high first FAIL, no tests detected. Each block names failure + exact recovery command.

tasks.title: Trust calibration callout
tasks.description: Add brief 'Where coverctl works best / where you may need adjustments' callout near top of quick-start.mdx. Names jagged-frontier limits: mock-heavy code, exotic monorepos, weaker support langs (Shell/Dart/Scala). Calibrates new-user trust expectations (Mollick).

tasks.title: Agent-mode quick-start page
tasks.description: Add docs/src/content/docs/quick-start-agent.mdx (or split current quick-start.mdx with parallel path selector at top): install → MCP server enable in Claude Code/Cursor/Cline → first agent-initiated check → screenshot or transcript of agent UI showing tool call, approval gate, structured rejection example, override capability. Closes wedge-invisible gap for primary ICP.

tasks.title: Cross-link + landing-page A/B copy
tasks.description: Cross-link agent-mode from terminal quick-start. Update docs/src/content/docs/index.mdx hero with parallel path selector (Terminal vs AI Agent). A/B test landing-page hero copy: Codecov-frame vs agent-loop-frame for 2 weeks; measure activation by source.

tasks.title: GTM activation funnel metrics + trace pipeline
tasks.description: Define activation rate (init users reaching first passing check), 30-day usage retention, advocate-mention count, plugin install velocity, enterprise inbound (procurement document requests). Implement opt-in trace donation pipeline (anonymous JSONL) for real-world eval corpus growth. Distinct from tool-execution telemetry.

tasks.title: Sean Ellis 40% PMF survey
tasks.description: Wire one-question Sean Ellis survey ('how would you feel if you could no longer use coverctl?') into CLI on Nth use (opt-in) or via docs site. Threshold: >40% very-disappointed = PMF signal.

tasks.title: Recruit 5 polyglot Claude Code users
tasks.description: Recruit 5 devs actively using Claude Code or Cursor: 2 Python+TS, 2 Go+Rust, 1 Java/Shell. Schedule sessions. Prep observation script: install from scratch, reach first fix, capture moment of MCP discovery (or non-discovery).

tasks.title: Run + report 5-user usability test
tasks.description: Run sessions, observe friction, capture: did they discover MCP/agent integration unprompted, did first failed check produce clear next action, time-to-first-fix, abandonment points. Write findings report; feed into next iteration.

tasks.title: Reconcile PRD with shipped state
tasks.description: Update docs/design/language-agnostic-prd.md from 'transition to 5 languages' framing to current shipped state (15 languages, full MCP platform) + next-bets section.

tasks.title: Define MCP tool-call success metrics spec
tasks.description: Write a short spec in docs defining instrumented metrics: tool-call success rate, rejection rate, time-to-success, pre-commit regression catch rate. Add a telemetry abstraction for opt-in data collection.

tasks.title: Polish golden-path UX for first-run
tasks.description: Tighten docs and CLI flow around init -> check -> suggest -> record. Add actionable 'what to do when it fails' snippets per step. Validate: new user from install to first fix in <10 minutes.

tasks.title: Build ICP-focused GTM brief
tasks.description: Create one-page messaging for polyglot AI-assisted teams with compliance governance needs. Include competitive alternatives and 'why now' narrative per April Dunford positioning methodology.

tasks.title: Publish enterprise security architecture doc
tasks.description: Write concise security note covering MCP threat model, prompt injection risks, sanitization boundaries in internal/mcp/sanitize.go. Create linkable doc for procurement/security reviews.

tasks.title: Implement Golden Path UX for First-Run
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Golden Path UX for First-Run. Tighten docs and CLI flow around a single golden path: init -> check -> suggest -> record. Include actionable failure-snippet guidance per step. New user goal: install to first fix in <10 minutes.

tasks.title: Extract first handler from large file
tasks.description: Perform first extraction slice from acknowledged large files (priority: internal/mcp/server.go). Move one tool/router handler to dedicated file. Verify ceiling tests still pass.

tasks.title: Implement Product Messaging & Docs Alignment
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Product Messaging & Docs Alignment. Align CLI help text, README, and PRD with current reality (15 languages, MCP-native, domain-aware positioning). Remove all Go-only wording from user-facing copy unless contextually Go-specific.

tasks.title: Implement Core Foundation
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Core Foundation. The essential building blocks of the project.

tasks.title: Implement Coverage Quality Hotspot Uplift
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Coverage Quality Hotspot Uplift. Add scenario tests for weaker coverage surfaces: internal/mcp, internal/cli, runner edge cases. Focus on failure-path handling and parser/runner boundary conditions.

tasks.title: Add scenario tests for weak coverage surfaces
tasks.description: Add integration-style scenario tests for internal/mcp, internal/cli, and runner edge cases (failure paths, parser boundary conditions, sanitization rejection cases).

tasks.title: Implement Architecture Drift Guardrails
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Architecture Drift Guardrails. Add explicit extraction plan and enforcement for acknowledged large files (service.go, cli.go, server.go). New capabilities must land in dedicated handler files per the existing ceiling-test contract.

tasks.title: Implement CI Product Metrics Dogfooding
tasks.description: Implement the feature: CI Product Metrics Dogfooding. Extend CI workflow (go.yml) to preserve machine-readable check/report outputs for trend analysis. Current dogfooding only asserts pass/fail; add structured artifact collection.

tasks.title: Remove Go-only wording from CLI help text
tasks.description: Update internal/cli/cli.go:424 usage string from 'for Go' to reflect 15-language, MCP-native, domain-aware positioning. Ensure README and help text use consistent terminology.

tasks.title: Add structured CI artifact collection
tasks.description: Extend .github/workflows/go.yml to preserve machine-readable check/report outputs (not just pass/fail). Store structured summary for trend analysis between CI runs.

tasks.title: Implement AI/Agent Success Metrics Baseline
tasks.description: Implement the feature: AI/Agent Success Metrics Baseline. Define and instrument MCP tool-call success metrics: success rate, rejection rate, time-to-success, pre-commit regression catch rate. Enable data-driven decisions on which 3 MCP tools drive retained value.

tasks.title: Implement GTM & Enterprise Readiness Package
tasks.description: Implement the feature: GTM & Enterprise Readiness Package. Build ICP-focused targeting for polyglot AI-assisted teams with compliance governance needs. Publish security architecture doc (MCP threat model + sanitization boundaries).
